zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth於大約1604年出生在英國。她於1622年1月與Matthew Marvin在英國艾可蕾托 本特利聖 馬也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她於1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼並於1635年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓。她去世於從1640年到1647年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德諾瓦爾可易亞斯特 諾瓦爾可 希斯托利卡爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth于大约1604年出生在英国。她于1622年1月与Matthew Marvin在英国艾可蕾托 本特利聖 馬也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她于1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼并于1635年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓。她去世于从1640年到1647年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德諾瓦爾可易亞斯特 諾瓦爾可 希斯托利卡爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.description: The Dutch discovered the Connecticut Region in 1614, but the European settlement of the region was largely the work of the English Puritans from Massachusetts.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

EARLIEST RECORDED MARKER Nathaniel Hayes BIRTH 1610 England DEATH 1635 (aged 24–25) Norwalk, Fairfield County, Connecticut, USA BURIAL East Norwalk Historical Cemetery Norwalk, Fairfield County, Connecticut, USA MEMORIAL ID 139814054 · View Source

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth was born about 1604, in England. She married Matthew Marvin in January 1622, in St Mary's Church, Little Bentley, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She immigrated to Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1635 and lived in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1635. She died from 1640 to 1647, in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in East Norwalk Historical Cemetery, Norwalk, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth è nata il circa 1604 nel England. Lei sposato Matthew Marvin nel gennaio 1622, nel St Mary's Church, Little Bentley, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Immigrata nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635 e vissuto a Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635. Morì da 1640 a 1647, nel Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolta a East Norwalk Historical Cemetery, Norwalk, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabethは約1604年にイギリスで生まれた。1622年1月にイギリスエセックスリットル ベントリースト マリ'ス チャーチでMatthew Marvinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーに移住し，1635年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンに住んでいた。彼女はから1640年まで1647年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドノーウォークエアスト ノーウォーク ヒストリカル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드
ko.East Norwalk Historical Cemetery, Norwal: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 노워크 이스트 노워크 히스토리칼 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth(은)는 대략 1604년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1622년 1월 영국 에세스 리틀 벤틀리 스트 마이'스 처르치에서 Matthew Marvin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1635년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이로 이민을 떠났고, 1635년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 살았다. 그녀는 1640년 부터 1647년 까지 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 노워크 이스트 노워크 히스토리칼 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth nasceu aproximadamente 1604, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Matthew Marvin em janeiro de 1622, em St Mary's Church, Little Bentley, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela imigrou para o Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1635 e viveu em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1635. Ela faleceu de 1640 a 1647, em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em East Norwalk Historical Cemetery, Norwalk, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth родилась около 1604 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Matthew Marvin январь 1622 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, литл бентли, эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она иммигрировала в массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году, а также жила в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году. Она умерла с 1640 по 1647 в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности эаст норвалк хисторикаль кеметири, норвалк, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth nació aproximadamente 1604, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Matthew Marvin en enero de 1622, en St Mary's Church, Little Bentley, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Inmigró a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1635 y vivió en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1635. Murió desde 1640 hasta 1647, en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en East Norwalk Historical Cemetery, Norwalk, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
